name: Shopify
shortDescription: Connect FlowRunner to [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) to manage orders, products, collections, customers, multi-location inventory, and Shopify Payments. Authenticates with OAuth2 (single-click app flow) and adds polling triggers for new orders, customers, products, and disputes.

actions.name: Get List of Orders
actions.description: Retrieves a list of orders from your Shopify store with optional filtering and pagination.

actions.name: Get Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single order by its ID with full details including line items, customer, and addresses.

actions.name: Get List of Products
actions.description: Retrieves a list of products from your Shopify store with optional filtering and pagination.

actions.name: Get Product
actions.description: Retrieves a single product by its ID with full details including variants, images, and options.

actions.name: Get List of Collections
actions.description: Retrieves a list of collections from your Shopify store.

actions.name: Get Collection
actions.description: Retrieves a single collection by its ID with product list.

actions.name: Get List of Customers
actions.description: Retrieves a list of customers from your Shopify store.

actions.name: Get Customer
actions.description: Retrieves a single customer by their ID with full details including addresses and order history.

actions.name: Get List of Locations
actions.description: Retrieves a list of store locations.

actions.name: Get Location
actions.description: Retrieves a single location by its ID with inventory levels.

actions.name: Get List of Inventory Levels
actions.description: Retrieves inventory levels for a specific location.

actions.name: Get Shop Balance
actions.description: Retrieves the shop's Shopify Payments account balance.

actions.name: Get List of Payouts
actions.description: Retrieves a list of payouts from your Shopify Payments account.

actions.name: Get List of Disputes
actions.description: Retrieves a list of payment disputes from your Shopify Payments account.

actions.name: Create Customer
actions.description: Creates a new customer in your Shopify store.

actions.name: Update Customer
actions.description: Updates an existing customer in your Shopify store.

actions.name: Delete Customer
actions.description: Deletes a customer from your Shopify store.

actions.name: Add Products to Collection
actions.description: Adds products to a collection.

actions.name: Remove Products from Collection
actions.description: Removes products from a collection.

actions.name: Adjust Inventory Levels
actions.description: Adjusts inventory levels for an item at a location by a delta amount.

actions.name: Set Inventory Quantities
actions.description: Sets the absolute inventory quantity for an item at a location.

actions.name: Update Inventory Item
actions.description: Updates an inventory item's properties.

actions.name: Add Tags
actions.description: Adds tags to a resource (order, customer, product, etc.).

actions.name: Remove Tags
actions.description: Removes tags from a resource (order, customer, product, etc.).

actions.name: Create Refund
actions.description: Creates a refund for an order.

idealUseCases: Retrieve and filter orders, then issue partial or full refunds with restock control.
Browse the catalog and collections, and curate collection membership.
Create and update customers; track multi-location inventory and stock levels.
Monitor Shopify Payments balance, payouts, and disputes; tag and react to store events.
agentIdeas: When a **Shopify** "On New Order" trigger fires, use **ShipBob** "Create Order" to push the order into fulfillment, then **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the customer a confirmation.
When a **Shopify** "On New Dispute" trigger fires, use **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to alert the finance team with the dispute amount and reason before the evidence deadline.
Use **Google Sheets** "Get Rows" to read a supplier restock feed, then call **Shopify** "Set Inventory Quantities" for each SKU to keep stock in sync.
